race.description: Goodyear Autocare Echuca Moama BM56 Hcp
race.comment: EVERY LITTLE THING (9) appreciated dropping back to the mile last start, running on nicely to be beaten just a length in a similar race to this at Werribee. That hit-out followed a five-week break so she should tighten up. This looks a very winnable race. PICK WISELY (2) shouldered 61.5kgs and returned to form last time out, making up many lengths to finish third over a shorter journey at Kyneton. Placed at two of his three runs at the mile. One of the key runners. TEMU TILLY (6) broke her maiden recently at the fourth attempt, showing plenty of grit to get up at Cranbourne. Tricky gate but can go forward and with further improvement to come she is a serious contender. SABEERIA (5) ran a better race last start at the second run back, appreciating the extra trip. Lightly raced filly who can take another step today and play a key role. TILL QUEEN (8) ran well after a 30-day let-up last time. Fitter and is right in the thick of this.
